---
title: Proof rendering
format: pdf
keep-tex: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    pdf:
      noErrors: default
      ensureLatexFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - '\\begin\{proof\}'
          - '\\end\{proof\}'
          - '\\begin\{remark\}'
          - '\\end\{remark\}'
---

## Proof with content

::: {.proof}
This is a proof with content.
:::

## Named proof

::: {.proof name="Of the main theorem"}
Named proof body.
:::

## Empty proof

::: {.proof}
:::

## Remark

::: {.remark}
This is a remark.
:::
